items.name: Bowl of Our Famous Chile
items.description: Red or green chile, pinto beans, choice of beef or chicken, hand-rolled flour tortilla

items.name: Breakfast Burrito
items.description: Hand-rolled flour tortilla, two scrambled eggs, potatoes, cheese, choice of meat and chile

items.name: Enchilada Plate
items.description: Three stacked corn tortillas layered with cheese and chile, side of beans, egg on top recommended

items.name: Carne Adovada Plate
items.description: Pork cubes slow-cooked in red chile and spices, beans, potatoes, flour tortilla

items.name: Duran's Chilaquiles
items.description: Bed of beans, tortilla chips, jack and yellow cheese, choice of chile, topped with onions and eggs

items.name: Duran's Combination Plate
items.description: Rolled cheese enchilada, tamale, taco, side of beans, lettuce and tomato

items.name: Stuffed Sopaipillas
items.description: Two sopaipillas topped with beans, cheese and chile, lettuce and tomatoes. Wed/Fri only

items.name: Tamale Plate
items.description: Two Duran's tamales, cheese, choice of chile, side of beans

items.name: Taco Plate
items.description: Three hard shell tacos, choice of protein, cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, side of beans and salsa

items.name: Tostadas
items.description: Two fried corn tortillas, spicy refried beans, cheese, lettuce, tomato, salsa and guacamole. Mon/Thu only

items.name: Burrito
items.description: Hand-rolled flour tortilla, beans, cheese, and your choice of chile. Meat add 3.50-5.50

items.name: Burger in a Tortilla
items.description: Third-pound patty, cheese, chile, lettuce, tomato, pickles and onion in a flour tortilla

items.name: Quesadilla
items.description: Hand-rolled flour tortilla, melted cheese, tomato, green onion, chile on the side

items.name: Torpedo
items.description: Hand-rolled flour tortilla filled with potatoes, choice of chile and cheese

items.name: Turkey and Jack in a Tortilla
items.description: Sliced turkey, jack cheese, green chile, lettuce, tomato, onion, side of guacamole and chips

items.name: Salsa and Chips
items.description: Housemade jalapeno salsa with house-fried corn tortilla chips

items.name: Guacamole, Salsa and Chips
items.description: Fresh guacamole topped with tomatoes and jalapeno salsa with corn chips

items.name: Tortilla Soup
items.description: Green chile chicken broth, corn tortilla chips, caramelized onions, cheese, avocado. Mon/Tue only

items.name: Duran's Frito Pie
items.description: Fritos base, beans, chile, cheese, lettuce and tomatoes, choice of meat

items.name: Duran's Style Huevos Rancheros
items.description: Two eggs, beans, potatoes, cheese, choice of chile, flour tortilla on the side. No corn tortilla under the eggs

items.name: Breakfast Enchiladas
items.description: Two rolled blue corn cheese enchiladas, egg on top, choice of chile, side of potatoes

items.name: Blue Corn Chicken Taco Plate
items.description: Two blue corn chicken tacos, jack cheese, side of beans, guacamole and salsa

items.name: Bob's Special
items.description: Beans, potatoes, choice of chile, garnish, flour tortilla. A Duran's original

items.name: Paul's Special
items.description: Rolled enchilada, pork tamale, beans, garnish, flour tortilla on the side
